scenarios.title: Adding Items Successfully to the Cart

steps.text: I have navigated to a product page on the website
there are no items in my shopping cart currently
I add multiple products of different categories into my cart by clicking 'Add to Cart' button for each item individually
all added items should appear in my shopping cart and be correctly assigned with their respective quantities, prices, and images.
the total price displayed on the screen after adding these items should match the sum calculated from individual product costs including taxes if applicable.

scenarios.title: Adding Items to Cart Fails Due to Insufficient Stock

steps.text: I have navigated to a popular item that is currently out of stock on the website
I attempt to add this product into my shopping cart by clicking 'Add to Cart' button for it individually, multiple times if necessary
an error message should appear indicating insufficient stock and preventing me from adding these items to my cart.

scenarios.title: Attempted End Session with Items in the Cart Fails Due to Unfinished Checkout Process

steps.text: I have added a few products into my shopping cart and navigated back from checkout page without completing it
I attempt to log out or navigate away during this unfinished process by clicking 'End Sesssion' button on the top right corner of the screen, multiple times if necessary
an error message should appear indicating that items in my cart are not saved and prompting me to complete checkout before logging out.
